shopify.title: Shopify connection
shopify.subtitle: The shop address and API token that bind this widget to your Shopify store.
shopify.accessTokenConfigured: Saved — enter a new token to replace

install.title: Install on your store
install.subtitle: Add the chat widget to your Shopify storefront. Pick the method that fits your setup.
install.shopHint: Snippets are filled in for your shop: {{shop}}
install.shopMissing: Save your shop domain above first so the snippets fill in automatically.
install.copyFailed: Could not copy — select the code and copy manually.

appEmbed.desc: No theme code editing, and easy to toggle on and off. Best for Online Store 2.0.
appEmbed.step1: In Shopify admin, open Online Store → Themes → Customize.
appEmbed.step3: Turn on "IVY USA TalkTalk" and click Save.

scriptTag.desc: Loads on every page via the Admin API. Registered automatically when the app is installed; use the request below to register it manually.
scriptTag.note: Send this with your Admin API access token. No theme edits required.

manual.desc: The simplest method — paste one snippet into your theme. No app required.
manual.step1: Open Online Store → Themes → ⋯ → Edit code.
manual.step3: Paste the snippet just before the </body> tag and Save.

integrations.configured: Saved — enter a new value to replace

cafe24.title: Cafe24
cafe24.subtitle: Connect your Cafe24 store via the Admin API (OAuth access token).

woocommerce.title: WooCommerce
woocommerce.subtitle: Connect your WooCommerce store with REST API consumer keys.

odoo.title: Odoo
odoo.subtitle: Connect Odoo via the external API (URL, database, user, API key).

haravan.title: Haravan
haravan.subtitle: Connect your Haravan store with an Admin API access token.
